original_image_tags: A hand-drawn sketch on a dark background depicting the object's trajectory. The sketch shows a dotted line path rising from the lower left, with five numbered positions marked. Position 1 is near the start, position 2 is slightly higher, position 3 is further along the rising path, position 4 shows the object appearing as a thin horizontal line, and position 5 shows the path curving over the top and disappearing. The path is annotated with small arrows indicating direction of movement.

elements.description: A hand-drawn diagram illustrating the flight path of an object. It features a vertical dotted line with numbered positions (1), (2), and (3) representing a jerky rising motion, transitioning to a curved solid line at position (4) and ending with a dashed line rolling over the top to disappear at position (5). Small circular symbols are placed at the numbered positions.
